summary: Full e2e test of KDMARCHÉ / LOLODRIVE by O'SCOP MVP. Backend: 24/24 pytest tests passed (auth, LOLODRIVE PASS/wallet/catalog/orders/POS/lolo-points/events/KPI, CRM contacts/orgs/opps/dossiers/tasks/impact/sync). Frontend: admin (/lolodrive, /pos, /admin/lolo-points, /admin/lolo-hour, /crm, /reporting-impact) and titulaire (/pass, /catalogue-lolodrive) screens load with seed data correctly.

minor.issue: Responses wrap arrays in named keys ({"products": [...]}, {"orders": [...]}, {"contacts": [...]}) — frontend already handles this but ensure consistency / document in OpenAPI.
Returns 401 for both admin and Marie tokens; called from a generic layout. Non-blocking for LOLODRIVE MVP but produces console errors on every protected page.

integration_issues.issue: GET /api/user-prefs/favorites/ids returns 401 on every protected page (admin and Marie), polluting console with errors

action_items: Optional: fix or guard the /api/user-prefs/favorites/ids call so it's not made for users without the favorites feature, or make it return [] instead of 401. Not blocking MVP.
critical_code_review_comments: routes_lolodrive_oscoop.py at 761 lines: still acceptable but consider splitting into PASS, orders, POS, lolo-points, events submodules if growth continues.
Order/Quote schemas use sku+qty (correct) while frontend correctly maps cart -> {sku, qty}. Make sure any future client docs reflect this.
Pay-UC response shape ({ok, order_id, paid_with, total_uc}) does not return updated order; consumers must re-fetch /orders/me. Consider returning the updated order for fewer round-trips.
PASS payload uses status='ACTIVE' (uppercase) + a separate top-level 'active' boolean; pick one canonical representation to avoid client drift.
Many endpoints return wrapped lists ({"products": [...]}) while a few return raw lists; standardise for OpenAPI consumers.
Frontend prints multiple console errors for an unrelated favorites endpoint on every page (401s). Should be guarded.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of MVP screens load + show seed data

test_credentials: admin@kdmarche-oscop.fr / AdminKDM2025! ; marie@example.com / Demo2026! ; pos@lolodrive.fr / Demo2026! (all from /app/memory/test_credentials.md)
seed_data_creation: No new seed required; /app/backend/seed_lolodrive.py already populated: 4 users, 12 products (8 ESSENTIAL + 4 NORMAL), 4 LOLO POINTS, 4 active events, 3 Marie orders, CRM (4 contacts, 5 orgs, 4 opps, 3 dossiers, 3 tasks). Note: Marie's wallet was decremented to ~234 UC during test runs (started at 450). Re-run seed to reset.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_lolodrive_oscoop.py covers all 31 LOLODRIVE endpoints + CRM. Run: `pytest backend/tests/test_lolodrive_oscoop.py -v`. Helper `_extract_list()` handles wrapped list responses. Tests create real orders+pay-uc which decrement Marie's wallet; re-seed if balance approaches 0. All admin pages require an admin user with is_admin=true; PASS pages require any authenticated user with active PASS. POS status transitions follow PAID→PREPARING→READY→FULFILLED (last one via /scan endpoint, not /status).
